callback_message: Start at Home for the picture, use a specialist dashboard for action, and use reports when you need proof or history.
description: Poloway is split into four operating areas: Owner and Scheduling, Horse Management, Money and Inventory, and Match Operations. The home dashboard shows the health of all four, then sends you into the right area for real work.
name: Understand the Poloway operating map
title: Understand the Poloway operating map
